name: gh-copilot-review
description: Streamline GitHub Copilot code review workflow with automated feedback monitoring. Watches for Copilot PR reviews, displays inline comments with file context, and enables AI-assisted fixes. Use '/gh-copilot-review' skill for full automation: wait → display feedback → apply fixes → resolve threads → push changes. Makes code review iteration effortless.
longDescription:
This plugin transforms GitHub Copilot code reviews into an interactive workflow within Cursor. It:
- Polls GitHub API for Copilot reviews on your PR
- Detects when GitHub Copilot is requested as a reviewer
- Displays review feedback with file paths, line numbers, and comments
- Provides context for each suggestion
- Allows Cursor AI to apply fixes directly
- Can resolve review threads after fixes
- Pushes updated code automatically

Perfect for iterating on PRs quickly without leaving your editor. The '/gh-copilot-review' skill automates the entire flow from detection to resolution.
features: Formatted feedback display with file context
Works for current branch or specific PR number
Integration with '/gh-copilot-review' skill for full automation
usageExamples: Workflow: Request Copilot review → run tool → get feedback → AI fixes issues

requiresSetup.ghCLI: Install GitHub CLI: brew install gh
requiresSetup.copilot: GitHub Copilot must be enabled for your organization/repo
